title: cirsium eriophorum subsp. degenii
intro: Cirsium eriophorum subsp. degenii, also known as the Degen's thistle, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion tribe within the sunflower family. It is a perennial herb that grows in the mountainous regions of the Balkan Peninsula and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and skin problems. The plant contains compounds with anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including soothing digestive issues, reducing inflammation, and promoting wound healing. Cirsium eriophorum subsp. degenii is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, to leverage its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
